title: pleopeltis lehmannii
intro: Pleopeltis lehmannii, also known as the lehmann's polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis lehmannii include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
